subject: Coordination brief: goldfish activities around Auckland | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-4685
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Auckland. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-4685. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
